creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
As I understand the release node, there is no change for users of eyaml: they already have installed hiera-eyaml by some mean, so updating should not be a surprise.

By the way, I can't find hiera-eyaml in the ports.  So I guess that if someone is using Puppet + hiera-eyaml, he will be able to figure out what happens if something strange happens.
